---
title: "Jane Doe"
description: "PhD Researcher, peptide identification, machine learning"
image: ../assets/images/team/placeholder.png
order: 2
---

## About

Short bio: research focus, background, and interests.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/)
